items.description: Apparently at @AIEMiami geoff complained about @SAPConcur being dead software and a SAP guy was in the audience and invited him to SAP to advise on how to do AI transformation for 6800 employees TLDR he made fun of SAP, and SAP… concurred…

items.title: We’re in a period where everything feels like it’s getting jumbled up across roles becaus…
items.title_zh: 我们正处于一个感觉一切都在角色之间变得混乱的时期，因为……
items.description: We’re in a period where everything feels like it’s getting jumbled up across roles because AI lets you explore the adjacencies of other functions more easily. We all collectively have to figure out the new form of definition of what these…
items.description_zh: 我们正处于一个感觉一切都在角色之间变得混乱的时期，因为人工智能可以让你更轻松地探索其他功能的相邻性。我们大家必须共同找出这些……的新定义形式。
